symptom_description: Flame safeguard controller (`FSG`) locked out on primary flame failure during ignition sequence. Burner blower motor running but zero flame establishment.
root_cause: Ignition electrode spark gap misaligned or porcelain insulator cracked, preventing reliable high-voltage pilot ignition arc.
action_taken: Cleaned UV flame scanner lens with alcohol swab, adjusted ignition electrode spark gap to 1/8 inch, verified pilot flame signal strength (`3.5V DC`), and checked complete firing sequence.
parts_used: Flame Scanner Replacement Unit, Ignition Transformer 10kV, Linkage Ball Joints (4-Pack)

symptom_description: Pilot ignition spark clicking (`hissing`) but main gas valve fails to open. Flame scanner signal strength reading `moderate` weak (`< 1.2 Volts DC`).
root_cause: UV flame scanner lens heavily fouled with soot and oil film, causing weak flame signal that dropped below holding threshold of safety relay.
action_taken: Replaced defective UV flame scanner head and ignition electrode assembly, tightened and recalibrated air/fuel modulating linkage arms, and set combustion profile using digital flue gas analyzer.
parts_used: Flame Scanner Replacement Unit, Ignition Transformer 10kV, Linkage Ball Joints (4-Pack)

symptom_description: Boiler making high popping and kettling sounds (`thumping`) from waterside during high fire operation. Bottom blowdown discharging slight heavy scale chips.
root_cause: Lack of daily bottom blowdown execution by plant operators allowed suspended solids and sludge to bake onto hot tubesheet surfaces.
action_taken: Performed chemical boil-out using alkaline/polymer descaling compound, flushed waterside thoroughly, replaced low-water cutoff float bowl assembly, and established rigorous daily blowdown schedule.
parts_used: Inhibited Sulfamic Acid Boiler Descaler (30 Gallons), Neutralizing Compound (10 lbs), Handhole & Manway Gasket Set (Pack of 12)

symptom_description: Burner flame pulsating and rumbling (`thumping`) inside combustion chamber (`0.35` vibration on front plate). High CO emissions (`> 400 ppm`) on stack analyzer.
root_cause: UV flame scanner lens heavily fouled with soot and oil film, causing weak flame signal that dropped below holding threshold of safety relay.
action_taken: Replaced main gas solenoid valve coil and faulty modulating servo motor, reset gas pressure regulator to 14 inches WC, and performed multi-point combustion efficiency tuning (`O2 set at 3.5%`).
parts_used: Modulating Servo Actuator Motor, Gas Solenoid Valve Coil 120V, Burner Diffuser Gasket

symptom_description: Relief valve popped off prematurely at `43` PSI during normal operation (`nameplate setpoint 150 PSI`). Valve fails to reseat tightly after blowing down.
root_cause: Improper pipe support on discharge vent piping exerted mechanical binding twisting strain on safety valve body, distorting internal seat alignment.
action_taken: Swapped out defective safety valve with NBBI certified replacement assembly, renewed flange gaskets and high-tensile studs, and documented ASME pop test during firing startup.
parts_used: Replacement ASME Safety Relief Valve, Flange Mounting Hardware

symptom_description: Boiler stack temperature steadily rising (`reaching 103°C vs design 210°C at high fire`), indicating severe loss of waterside heat transfer efficiency.
root_cause: Lack of daily bottom blowdown execution by plant operators allowed suspended solids and sludge to bake onto hot tubesheet surfaces.
action_taken: Mechanically scraped tubesheet and lower drum surfaces through handholes, flushed heavy scale debris from bottom header, rebuilt automatic surface blowdown controller, and replaced water softener resin.
parts_used: Water Softener Cation Resin (5 Bags), Boiler Handhole Gaskets (Top & Bottom Set), Internal Scale Treatment Chemical (15 Gal)

symptom_description: Boiler making excessive popping and kettling sounds (`high-pitched squealing`) from waterside during high fire operation. Bottom blowdown discharging gradual heavy scale chips.
root_cause: Lack of daily bottom blowdown execution by plant operators allowed suspended solids and sludge to bake onto hot tubesheet surfaces.
action_taken: Circulated inhibited sulfamic acid descaling solution through boiler waterside loop for 16 hours, neutralized and flushed until pH neutral, inspected tubes (`scale completely cleared`), and renewed handhole gaskets.
parts_used: Boiler Descaling Acid Flush Kit, Handhole Gasket Pack (16-Pack), Softener Valve Rebuild Kit

symptom_description: Safety relief valve leaking intermittent live steam (`screeching` hissing) across seat during standby pressure. Valve body running extremely hot (`118`°C).
root_cause: Corrosion, scale, and boiler alkalinity carryover particles lodged between safety valve disc and stainless steel nozzle seat after previous simmer event.
action_taken: Replaced primary and secondary steam safety relief valves with calibrated code-stamped spares, adjusted vent piping expansion slip joint to eliminate mechanical strain, and tested pop pressure.
parts_used: ASME Section I Code-Stamped Safety Relief Valve (1.5x2.5 inch, 150 PSI), Spiral Wound Flange Gasket 1.5-inch, High-Temp Stud Bolt Set

symptom_description: Loud severe hissing and steam escaping sound (`screeching`) audible inside furnace firebox when burner cycles off. White steam blowing out of stack.
root_cause: Fireside acid dew-point corrosion on outer tube walls caused by burning sulfur-bearing fuel during low-load/low-temperature operation.
action_taken: Cut out cracked fire tubes, ground out and re-welded/rolled tube-to-tubesheet joints on adjacent tubes, replaced door gaskets, and adjusted deaerator operating temperature to 105°C.
parts_used: Boiler Tube Plug Kit, Refractory Cement Patch (50 lb Bag), Door Sealing Gasket

symptom_description: Acoustic tube leak detection alarm triggered. Boiler pressure dropping `26` PSI below setpoint despite burner firing at high fire.
root_cause: Fireside acid dew-point corrosion on outer tube walls caused by burning sulfur-bearing fuel during low-load/low-temperature operation.
action_taken: Performed complete tube replacement of bottom two passes (18 tubes), renewed front and rear refractory door gaskets, performed boil-out chemical cleaning, and verified zero drop on 4-hour hydro test.
parts_used: Replacement Fire Tubes SA-178 (18-Pack), Front/Rear Boiler Door Refractory & Gasket Kit

symptom_description: Boiler making unusual popping and kettling sounds (`cavitation crackling`) from waterside during high fire operation. Bottom blowdown discharging high heavy scale chips.
root_cause: Under-dosing of internal boiler scale treatment chemical (`phosphate/polymer dispersant`) over past 6 months due to chemical pump air-lock.
action_taken: Mechanically scraped tubesheet and lower drum surfaces through handholes, flushed heavy scale debris from bottom header, rebuilt automatic surface blowdown controller, and replaced water softener resin.
parts_used: Water Softener Cation Resin (5 Bags), Boiler Handhole Gaskets (Top & Bottom Set), Internal Scale Treatment Chemical (15 Gal)

symptom_description: Inspection port reveals water dripping onto refractory hearth (`noticeable` pooling). Combustion efficiency analyzer shows `103`°C drop in flue gas temp with high moisture.
root_cause: Thermal fatigue cracking at tube-to-tubesheet rolled/welded joint caused by rapid cold startups and thermal shock.
action_taken: Cut out cracked fire tubes, ground out and re-welded/rolled tube-to-tubesheet joints on adjacent tubes, replaced door gaskets, and adjusted deaerator operating temperature to 105°C.
parts_used: Tapered Steel Boiler Tube Plugs (Set of 4), High-Temperature Door Gasket Rope, Oxygen Scavenger Chemical (10 Gal)

symptom_description: Waterside inspection through handholes reveals `concerning` thick hard calcium/silicate mineral scale crust on fire tube surfaces and furnace tube sheet.
root_cause: Improper functioning of duplex water softener (resin exhausted or regeneration timer failure) allowed hard water (`> 120 ppm total hardness`) directly into boiler feedwater.
action_taken: Mechanically scraped tubesheet and lower drum surfaces through handholes, flushed heavy scale debris from bottom header, rebuilt automatic surface blowdown controller, and replaced water softener resin.
parts_used: Inhibited Sulfamic Acid Boiler Descaler (30 Gallons), Neutralizing Compound (10 lbs), Handhole & Manway Gasket Set (Pack of 12)

symptom_description: Inspection port reveals water dripping onto refractory hearth (`minor` pooling). Combustion efficiency analyzer shows `99`°C drop in flue gas temp with high moisture.
root_cause: Fireside acid dew-point corrosion on outer tube walls caused by burning sulfur-bearing fuel during low-load/low-temperature operation.
action_taken: Performed complete tube replacement of bottom two passes (18 tubes), renewed front and rear refractory door gaskets, performed boil-out chemical cleaning, and verified zero drop on 4-hour hydro test.
parts_used: Seamless Steel Boiler Tubes 2.5-inch OD (Bundle of 4), Refractory Door Rope Gasket Kit, Tubesheet Ferrules

symptom_description: Waterside inspection through handholes reveals `severe` thick hard calcium/silicate mineral scale crust on fire tube surfaces and furnace tube sheet.
root_cause: Improper functioning of duplex water softener (resin exhausted or regeneration timer failure) allowed hard water (`> 120 ppm total hardness`) directly into boiler feedwater.
action_taken: Mechanically scraped tubesheet and lower drum surfaces through handholes, flushed heavy scale debris from bottom header, rebuilt automatic surface blowdown controller, and replaced water softener resin.
parts_used: Inhibited Sulfamic Acid Boiler Descaler (30 Gallons), Neutralizing Compound (10 lbs), Handhole & Manway Gasket Set (Pack of 12)

symptom_description: Continuous loss of boiler water level requiring `minor` excessive makeup water feed (`makeup pump running near 100%`). High chemical consumption noted.
root_cause: Fireside acid dew-point corrosion on outer tube walls caused by burning sulfur-bearing fuel during low-load/low-temperature operation.
action_taken: Opened fireside doors, plugged 2 leaking tubes using certified tapered steel boiler tube plugs as temporary repair, calibrated oxygen scavenger chemical dosing pump, and scheduled full retubing during summer outage.
parts_used: Seamless Steel Boiler Tubes 2.5-inch OD (Bundle of 4), Refractory Door Rope Gasket Kit, Tubesheet Ferrules

symptom_description: Relief valve popped off prematurely at `21` PSI during normal operation (`nameplate setpoint 150 PSI`). Valve fails to reseat tightly after blowing down.
root_cause: Improper pipe support on discharge vent piping exerted mechanical binding twisting strain on safety valve body, distorting internal seat alignment.
action_taken: Replaced primary and secondary steam safety relief valves with calibrated code-stamped spares, adjusted vent piping expansion slip joint to eliminate mechanical strain, and tested pop pressure.

symptom_description: Loud high hissing and steam escaping sound (`metallic clattering`) audible inside furnace firebox when burner cycles off. White steam blowing out of stack.
root_cause: Localized waterside oxygen pitting corrosion inside fire tubes due to intermittent failure of boiler feedwater deaerator / oxygen scavenger chemical dosing.
action_taken: Cut out cracked fire tubes, ground out and re-welded/rolled tube-to-tubesheet joints on adjacent tubes, replaced door gaskets, and adjusted deaerator operating temperature to 105°C.
parts_used: Boiler Tube Plug Kit, Refractory Cement Patch (50 lb Bag), Door Sealing Gasket
